project_readout.summary: v91 checks whether systemic low-risk enlargement starts turning into a broader and more explicit low-risk regime instead of only enlarging the previous expansion shell.
project_readout.next_question: next push this enlarged low-risk regime into larger and longer systems to test whether it keeps broadening toward a wider low-risk zone.
